tasks.label: Stop Dev Server (3000)
args: $port=3000; $listeners = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($listeners) { $pids = $listeners | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($p in $pids) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Output 'Stopped listeners on port 3000 (if any).'

tasks.label: Restart Dev Server (3000)
args: $port=3000; $listeners = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($listeners) { $pids = $listeners | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($p in $pids) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; $env:NODE_OPTIONS=''; node .\node_modules\tsx\dist\cli.mjs server.ts
